Project Coordinator Wanted

Fast-growing tech company seeks an able-bodied project coordinator. This role requires someone who can hit the ground running and keep pace with our dynamic team.

Essential Requirements:
- Must be able to stand for long periods during team meetings
- Perfect vision for reviewing detailed documents and presentations
- Excellent hearing for participating in rapid-fire brainstorming sessions
- Physical capability to attend multiple office locations weekly

We need a healthy individual without limitations who can work independently without special accommodations. The role involves frequent travel and the ability to work flexible hours including evenings and weekends. This is a demanding position not suitable for anyone with health restrictions or special needs.
